sigWerErrors.reason: 'artı' (plus) is a critical part of the phone number format (country code), while 'sıfır' (zero) is a digit; this changes the meaning and structure of the number.
An extra 'sıfır' (zero) changes the digit sequence of the phone number, making it incorrect.
An extra 'dört' (four) alters the digit sequence, resulting in an incorrect phone number.
